name: rapitas
description: 階層型タスク管理システム

scripts.dev:frontend: cd rapitas-frontend && cross-env pnpm run dev
scripts.tauri: cd rapitas-desktop && pnpm run tauri dev --watch
scripts.tauri:build: cd rapitas-desktop && pnpm run tauri build
scripts.build:web: node scripts/switch-to-postgres.cjs && cd rapitas-frontend && pnpm run build
scripts.install:all: cd rapitas-backend && bun install && cd ../rapitas-frontend && pnpm install && cd ../rapitas-desktop && pnpm install
scripts.test:all: concurrently "cd rapitas-backend && bun test" "cd rapitas-frontend && pnpm test" --names "BE-TEST,FE-TEST" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta"
scripts.lint:all: concurrently "cd rapitas-backend && bun run lint" "cd rapitas-frontend && pnpm run lint" --names "BE-LINT,FE-LINT" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta"
scripts.lint:fix: cd rapitas-frontend && npx prettier --write "src/**/*.{ts,tsx}" && npx eslint --fix "src/**/*.{ts,tsx}" && cd ../rapitas-backend && npx prettier --write "**/*.ts"
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd rapitas-backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:push: cd rapitas-backend && npx prisma db push
